description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a pip cache at $CI_PROJECT_PATH/.cache/pip, defines DEBIAN_FRONTEND and XDG_CACHE_HOME variables, and includes the external template https://gitlab.com/coala/mobans/raw/master/templates/ci/gitlab-ci-base.yml. Add a coala-pyflakes job in the default test stage using the python:3.5 image, with a before_script that installs setuptools==21.2.2 and pip==9.0.1, then installs coala and its bears from git, and runs `coala --ci`. Add a lint job in the test stage using python:3.6, with a before_script that installs setuptools==21 and pip==9.0.1, installs coala and coala-bears from git, and runs `coala --ci`. Add a moban job in the test stage using python:3.6, with a before_script that installs moban constrained by test-requirements.txt, and runs the script `.ci/check_moban.sh`. Add four test jobs named tests:3.4, tests:3.5, tests:3.6, and tests:3.7 in the test stage, using python:3.4-alpine, python:3.5-alpine, python:3.6-alpine, and python:3.7-alpine respectively, each extending the .common_script template (retry 2) that adds espeak, git, gcc, musl-dev, installs moban, pins setuptools and pip, installs requirements, then runs `$PYTHON -m pytest --cov-fail-under=100` and `$PYTHON -m codecov` and defines a coverage regex '/Total coverage: \d+\.\d+%/'.
